sentences.text_original: 师傅，您好！请问您走吗？
sentences.pinyin: Shīfu, nín hǎo! Qǐngwèn nín zǒu ma?
sentences.text_translation: Usta, assalomu alaykum! Yo'lga chiqasizmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Водитель, здравствуйте! Скажите, вы свободны (едете)?
sentences.text_translation_en: Driver, hello! Excuse me, are you available?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 走！您去哪儿？
sentences.pinyin: Zǒu! Nín qù nǎr?
sentences.text_translation: Boraman! Qayerga borasiz?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Еду! Вам куда?
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes! Where to?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我去中山路88号，阳光大厦。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ qù Zhōngshān Lù bāshíbā hào, Yángguāng Dàshà.
sentences.text_translation: Men Chjongshan ko'chasi 88-uyga, Yangguang binosiga boraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Мне на улицу Чжуншань, дом 88, бизнес-центр «Янгуан».
sentences.text_translation_en: I'm going to 88 Zhongshan Road, the Yangguang Building.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 中山路？那边有点堵，不过我可以给您绕一下快速路，会快一些，但是距离稍微远一点。
sentences.pinyin: Zhōngshān Lù? Nà biān yǒu diǎn dǔ, búguò wǒ kěyǐ gěi nín rào yíxià kuàisù lù, huì kuài yì xiē, dànshì jùlí shāowēi yuǎn yì diǎn.
sentences.text_translation: Chjongshan ko'chasimi? U yoqda biroz tirbandlik bor, lekin men sizni tezyurar yo'ldan aylantirib olib o'tsam bo'ladi, tezroq bo'ladi, faqat masofa bir oz uzoqroq.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Улица Чжуншань? Там немного пробки, но я могу объехать по скоростной дороге, будет быстрее, хотя расстояние чуть больше.
sentences.text_translation_en: Zhongshan Road? It's a bit congested over there, but I can take a detour via the expressway — it'll be faster, though the distance is slightly longer.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 绕路的话大概要多长时间？
sentences.pinyin: Rào lù dehuà dàgài yào duō cháng shíjiān?
sentences.text_translation: Aylanma yo'ldan ketsak, taxminan qancha vaqt ketadi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Если ехать в объезд, примерно сколько времени займёт?
sentences.text_translation_en: If we take the detour, roughly how long will it take?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不堵的话大概二十分钟。如果走最近的路，可能要四十分钟。
sentences.pinyin: Bù dǔ dehuà dàgài èrshí fēnzhōng. Rúguǒ zǒu zuì jìn de lù, kěnéng yào sìshí fēnzhōng.
sentences.text_translation: Tirbandlik bo'lmasa taxminan yigirma daqiqa. Eng yaqin yo'ldan ketsak, qirq daqiqa ketishi mumkin.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Без пробок примерно двадцать минут. Если ехать кратчайшим путём, может уйти сорок минут.
sentences.text_translation_en: Without traffic, about twenty minutes. If we take the shortest route, it might take forty.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那就走快速路吧，时间比较重要。大概多少钱？
sentences.pinyin: Nà jiù zǒu kuàisù lù ba, shíjiān bǐjiào zhòngyào. Dàgài duōshao qián?
sentences.text_translation: Unda tezyurar yo'ldan ketaylik, vaqt muhimroq. Taxminan qancha bo'ladi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда поедем по скоростной, время важнее. Примерно сколько будет стоить?
sentences.text_translation_en: Then let's take the expressway, time matters more. About how much will it cost?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 按里程计费，估计三十块左右。比走普通路贵几块钱，但省时间。
sentences.pinyin: Àn lǐchéng jìfèi, gūjì sānshí kuài zuǒyòu. Bǐ zǒu pǔtōng lù guì jǐ kuài qián, dàn shěng shíjiān.
sentences.text_translation: Masofaga qarab hisoblanadi, taxminan o'ttiz yuan-ga yaqin. Oddiy yo'ldan ketgandan bir necha yuan qimmatroq, lekin vaqtni tejaydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Оплата по километражу, ориентировочно около тридцати юаней. На несколько юаней дороже обычной дороги, зато экономит время.
sentences.text_translation_en: Charged by distance, I'd estimate around thirty yuan. A few yuan more than the regular route, but it saves time.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 好，那走吧。师傅，我赶时间，麻烦您稍微开快一点，但别超速。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo, nà zǒu ba. Shīfu, wǒ gǎn shíjiān, máfan nín shāowēi kāi kuài yì diǎn, dàn bié chāosù.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, unda ketaylik. Usta, men shoshyapman, iltimos biroz tezroq haydang, lekin tezlikdan oshmang.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, тогда поехали. Водитель, я тороплюсь, пожалуйста, езжайте чуть быстрее, но не превышайте скорость.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, let's go. Driver, I'm in a hurry, please drive a bit faster, but don't speed.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 放心，我知道。您把安全带系好，我们出发了。
sentences.pinyin: Fàngxīn, wǒ zhīdào. Nín bǎ ānquándài jì hǎo, wǒmen chūfā le.
sentences.text_translation: Xotirjam bo'ling, bilaman. Xavfsizlik kamarini taqib oling, jo'nadik.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не волнуйтесь, я понял. Пристегните ремень безопасности, мы поехали.
sentences.text_translation_en: Don't worry, I know. Fasten your seatbelt, we're off.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 师傅，还有多久能到？
sentences.pinyin: Shīfu, hái yǒu duō jiǔ néng dào?
sentences.text_translation: Usta, yetib borishga yana qancha bor?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Водитель, сколько ещё до места?
sentences.text_translation_en: Driver, how much longer until we arrive?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 快了，前面第二个红绿灯右转就到了。大概还有五分钟。
sentences.pinyin: Kuài le, qiánmiàn dì-èr ge hónglǜdēng yòu zhuǎn jiù dào le. Dàgài hái yǒu wǔ fēnzhōng.
sentences.text_translation: Yaqin qoldi, oldinda ikkinchi svetoforda o'ngga burilsak yetib boramiz. Taxminan yana besh daqiqa.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Уже скоро, на втором светофоре впереди повернём направо — и приехали. Примерно ещё пять минут.
sentences.text_translation_en: Almost there — turn right at the second traffic light ahead and we're there. About five more minutes.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 好的，谢谢您。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, xièxie nín.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, rahmat sizga.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, спасибо вам.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, thank you.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 您在这个路口下车可以吗？正好在门口，不用过马路。
sentences.pinyin: Nín zài zhè ge lùkǒu xià chē kěyǐ ma? Zhènghǎo zài ménkǒu, búyòng guò mǎlù.
sentences.text_translation: Shu chorrahada tushsangiz bo'ladimi? Aynan eshik oldida, yo'ldan o'tishingiz shart emas.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Можно высадить вас на этом перекрёстке? Как раз у входа, не придётся переходить дорогу.
sentences.text_translation_en: Is it okay if you get out at this intersection? It's right by the entrance, no need to cross the road.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 可以可以，就在这儿停吧。多少钱？
sentences.pinyin: Kěyǐ kěyǐ, jiù zài zhèr tíng ba. Duōshao qián?
sentences.text_translation: Bo'ladi, bo'ladi, shu yerda to'xtang. Qancha bo'ldi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да-да, остановите прямо здесь. Сколько с меня?
sentences.text_translation_en: Sure, sure, just stop here. How much is it?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 三十二块五，给您算三十二吧。
sentences.pinyin: Sānshí'èr kuài wǔ, gěi nín suàn sānshí'èr ba.
sentences.text_translation: O'ttiz ikki yuan-u besh mao, sizga o'ttiz ikki qilib hisoblay qolay.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тридцать два пятьдесят, давайте посчитаю вам тридцать два.
sentences.text_translation_en: Thirty-two-fifty — I'll just count it as thirty-two for you.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 给您五十块，您找十八块就行。
sentences.pinyin: Gěi nín wǔshí kuài, nín zhǎo shíbā kuài jiù xíng.
sentences.text_translation: Sizga ellik yuan beraman, o'n sakkiz yuan qaytim bersangiz bo'ldi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Вот вам пятьдесят, сдачи восемнадцать — и всё.
sentences.text_translation_en: Here's fifty, just give me eighteen back.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好，找您十八块。拿好随身物品，别忘了东西。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo, zhǎo nín shíbā kuài. Ná hǎo suíshēn wùpǐn, bié wàng le dōngxi.
sentences.text_translation: Mayli, o'n sakkiz yuan qaytim. Shaxsiy buyumlaringizni oling, narsangizni unutmang.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, сдачи восемнадцать. Возьмите свои вещи, ничего не забудьте.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, eighteen back. Take your belongings, don't forget anything.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 好的，谢谢师傅！
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, xièxie shīfu!
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, rahmat, usta!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, спасибо, водитель!
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, thank you, driver!
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不客气！慢走！
sentences.pinyin: Bú kèqi! Màn zǒu!
sentences.text_translation: Arzimaydi! Yaxshi boring!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не за что! Счастливого пути!
sentences.text_translation_en: You're welcome! Take care!
sentences.speaker: B
